title: White House AI Deal Would Override State Laws, Mandate Age Verification
description: The White House has proposed a federal artificial intelligence (AI) framework that would override existing state AI regulations and require age verification for users of AI systems, according to officials familiar with the plan. title: Punjab proposes new law to stop AI misuse of artists’ identities
description: The Punjab government has proposed a new law to protect entertainers from the misuse of artificial intelligence (AI).
content:
The Punjab government has proposed a new law to protect entertainers from the misuse of artificial intelligence (AI).

title: US state attorneys general are investigating OpenAI
description: A coalition of states has opened a wide-ranging investigation into artificial intelligence startup OpenAI, the company said Saturday, adding to a growing backlash over AI. US state attorneys general subpoenaed OpenAI asking for internal documents on its practices, including its handling of user data, safety of minors and advertising activities, according to the company.

title: Canadian PM Carney says G7 Summit could weave "strands" of new world order
description: Canadian PM Mark Carney stated that the 'strands' of a new world order could be woven at the G7 Summit in Evian. Speaking in Dublin, Carney emphasised that adding outreach partners like India proves the G7 no longer runs the world alone, while urging common global safety standards for Artificial Intelligence.
content:
Dublin [Ireland], June 14 (ANI): Canadian Prime Minister Mark Carney has stated that the "strands" of a new world order could be woven at the G7 Summit, set to be hosted by France in the spa town of Evian from June 15 to 17.

title: Trump tried to block state AI regulations, but some states are forging ahead
description: Six months after President Donald Trump warned states not to regulate artificial intelligence, they are increasingly doing just that. HARRISBURG, Pa.
content:

description: China is accelerating its push for "Smart Campuses" through the use of artificial intelligence and big data technology to monitor and analyse classroom behaviour and teaching patterns of both students and teachers in real time.

title: Court finds Google liable for false AI answers in landmark case
description: Google can be held directly liable for false answers generated by its in-house artificial intelligence (AI), a German court ruled, in a case that could have major implications for tech companies.
